system_objective.trigger: User selects a date range and generates a report
system_objective.output: Ranked gross-margin report by SKU and discount code with CSV export
system_objective.human_escalation: Escalate when SKU cost data is missing, stale, or the report shows unusual negative-margin rows that require business judgment

components: Small web UI for date range input and report viewing
Backend API for report creation and retrieval
Reporting worker for Shopify data ingestion and aggregation
Relational database for report runs, normalized order lines, cost mappings, and warnings
inputs: Shopify line items and product metadata
outputs: On-screen report by SKU and discount code
Warnings for missing costs and anomalous negative margins
integrations: Email or in-app notification for failed runs and data-quality warnings
manual_steps: Review warnings for missing or stale costs
Interpret whether negative-margin rows are acceptable business decisions
automated_steps: Fetch orders, refunds, and line items from Shopify
Compute revenue, discounts, refunds, COGS, and gross margin metrics
Generate the report and CSV export
milestones: Define metric rules and warning thresholds
Build Shopify ingestion and normalized order-line storage
Add SKU cost management and margin calculations
Ship the self-serve reporting UI and CSV export
Validate with finance spot checks and limited rollout
